Fields.Name: On-Hit SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The on-hit SpEffect to apply to enemies when this attach effect is present.

Fields.Name: Passive SpEffect ID: 1
Fields.Description: The passive SpEffect to apply when this attach effect is present.

Fields.Name: Passive SpEffect ID: 2
Fields.Description: The passive SpEffect to apply when this attach effect is present.

Fields.Name: Passive SpEffect ID: 3
Fields.Description: The passive SpEffect to apply when this attach effect is present.

Fields.Name: Compatibility ID
Fields.Description: Entries with the same compatibility ID cannot appear together on a relic or weapon.

Fields.Name: Text ID
Fields.Description: The text to use for the title and description for this effect.

Fields.Name: Is Persistent Effect
Fields.Description: If enabled, this effect persists even if the source isn't actively held. If disabled, this effect is only active is the source is actively held.

Fields.Name: Is Numeric Effect
Fields.Description: If enabled, +/- symbols are displayed to the left of the modifier value.

Fields.Name: Is Strongest Effect
Fields.Description: If enabled, this effect is considered the strongest out of its set.

Fields.Name: Is Debuff
Fields.Description: If enabled, this effect is displayed as a debuff.

Fields.Name: Display Percentage Symbol
Fields.Description: If enabled, the displayed modifier will use a % symbol.

Fields.Name: Is for Wylder
Fields.Description: If enabled, this attach effect is usable with Wylder.

Fields.Name: Is for Guardian
Fields.Description: If enabled, this attach effect is usable with Guardian.

Fields.Name: Is for Ironeye
Fields.Description: If enabled, this attach effect is usable with Ironeye.

Fields.Name: Is for Duchess
Fields.Description: If enabled, this attach effect is usable with Duchess.

Fields.Name: Is for Raider
Fields.Description: If enabled, this attach effect is usable with Raider.

Fields.Name: Is for Revenant
Fields.Description: If enabled, this attach effect is usable with Revenant.

Fields.Name: Is for Recluse
Fields.Description: If enabled, this attach effect is usable with Recluse.

Fields.Name: Is for Executor
Fields.Description: If enabled, this attach effect is usable with Executor.

Fields.Name: Is for Scholar
Fields.Description: If enabled, this attach effect is usable with Scholar.

Fields.Name: Is for Undertaker
Fields.Description: If enabled, this attach effect is usable with Undertaker.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon ID to use to display this effect under the top HUD bar.

Fields.Name: Base SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The base SpEffect for attach effects with multiple levels.

Fields.Name: Displayed Value
Fields.Description: The value displayed in the UI for this effect.

Fields.Name: Override SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The override SpEffect for attach effects with multiple levels.

Fields.Name: Filter Category
Fields.Description: The attach filter to apply to this effect.

Fields.Name: Exclusivity ID
Fields.Description: If two equipped relics share an effect, the relic selection screen will display a red exclamation mark over the shared effect.

Fields.Name: Permanent SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The SpEffect to apply for a permanent buff.
